news.title: To support the American workforce, prepare students for a future reshaped by climate change
news.summary_en: At this moment, the American workforce faces immense challenges: AI, demographic changes, and lagging academic achievement, to name only a few. To tackle these challenges, states need a future-focused strategy that expands opportunities.

news.title: This is the last “old” college admissions cycle
news.summary_en: When 5W started working with higher ed clients, the college search playbook ran on a predictable rhythm. Viewbooks, campus tours, search name purchases, Common App funnel management, a tight paid-media plan, and a frantic spring yield push.
